subject: Order Damaged
body: I received my order #ORD-2026 today but the item is completely shattered. This is unacceptable! I want a full refund immediately.

subject: Where is my stuff?
body: Hi, I ordered two days ago (Order #ORD-7788) and haven't seen an update. Can you tell me the status?

subject: AWFUL SERVICE - NEVER BUYING AGAIN
body: I've been waiting for my refund for weeks. Stop wasting my time! I want to talk to a manager or I'm calling my lawyer.

subject: Product Compatibility Query
body: Does the Tixora-X model work with 220V outlets in Europe? I couldn't find this in the manual.
